note: Board-authorized annual salaries set by resolutions 2025-8 through 2025-18 (Elected Officials, General Fund, Boards, Police, Highway, Water, Street Lighting). This is authorized pay, not actual pay. The Sewer/Scavenger schedule lists fund-allocation percentages rather than dollar amounts, and purely seasonal/hourly call-in staff are not included.
